entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The crop species being studied for drought tolerance.

entities.name: SAMBA MAHSURI SUB-1
entities.description: A high yielding rice mega-variety used as the recipient for QTL pyramiding.

entities.name: DRR-50
entities.description: An essentially derived variety of Samba Mahsuri Sub-1 carrying the qDTY3.1 QTL.

entities.name: SABD LINES
entities.description: Pyramided rice progenies carrying both qDTY1.1 and qDTY3.1 QTLs.

entities.name: QDTY1.1
entities.description: A quantitative trait locus (QTL) associated with drought tolerant yield.

entities.name: QDTY3.1
entities.description: A quantitative trait locus (QTL) associated with drought tolerant yield.

entities.name: SD-1
entities.description: A gene tightly linked to qDTY1.1 that influences plant height.

entities.name: WATER DEFICIT
entities.description: A stress condition causing significant loss in rice productivity.

entities.name: MOISTURE STRESS
entities.description: The environmental condition under which the physiological performance of SABD lines was evaluated.

entities.name: MARKER ASSISTED PYRAMIDING
entities.description: The technique used to combine multiple QTLs into a single genotype.

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of crop yield affected by water deficit.

entities.name: CHLOROPHYLL
entities.description: A physiological parameter measured to indicate stress tolerance.

entities.name: RELATIVE WATER CONTENT
entities.description: A physiological parameter measured to indicate stress tolerance.

entities.name: CANOPY TEMPERATURE
entities.description: A physiological parameter measured to indicate stress tolerance.

entities.name: MALONALDEHYDE CONTENT
entities.description: A physiological parameter measured to indicate stress tolerance.

entities.name: TEST WEIGHT
entities.description: A yield-related trait evaluated in the study.

entities.name: SEED MORPHOLOGY
entities.description: A character used to identify superior SABD lines.

entities.name: AGRONOMIC CHARACTERS
entities.description: Characters used to identify superior SABD lines.

entities.name: PHYSIOLOGICAL PARAMETERS
entities.description: Parameters used to evaluate the performance of SABD lines under moisture stress.
